title: Flex Ltd. (FLEX) CEO Revathi Advaithi on Q1 2023 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Flex Ltd. (NASDAQ:FLEX ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 27, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants David Rubin - IR Revathi Advaithi - CEO Paul Lundstrom - CFO Conference Call Participants Steven Fox - Fox Advisors Mark Delaney - Goldman Sachs Ruplu Bhattacharya - Bank of America Matt Sheerin - Stifel Jim Suva - Citigroup Melissa Fairbanks - Raymond James Operator Good afternoon, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to Flex's Fiscal First Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Flex (FLEX) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Flex (FLEX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10.20% and 8.12%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Here's Why Investors Need to Retain FLEX in the Portfolio
text: FLEX is benefiting from higher demand for its solutions across end markets like automotive and industrial.

title: 7 Nasdaq Stocks Trading at a Huge Discount Right Now
text: With the markets performing worse than they have in years, finding Nasdaq stocks trading at a discount is easier than ever. The post 7 Nasdaq Stocks Trading at a Huge Discount Right Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Flex Announces Date for First Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings Call
text: SAN JOSE, Calif. , July 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) will announce its first quarter fiscal 2023 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, July 27, 2022.
